name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible defect in CtrlPlus
title: '[bug] '
labels:

- bug
  assignees: []

---

## Summary

Describe the defect in one or two sentences.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to `...`
2. Click `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead?
